name: voice_calls_create
description: Create an outbound voice call to a phone number, SIP, or WebSocket endpoint. Provide an answer_url that returns an NCCO (Nexmo Call Control Object) defining the call flow, or specify NCCO actions inline.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Array of destination objects. Each has 'type' ('phone', 'sip', 'websocket') and 'number' or 'uri'.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Caller ID object with 'type' ('phone') and 'number' (your Vonage number in E.164 format).

parameters.name: answer_url
parameters.description: Array of URLs returning NCCO JSON for the call flow. Required if ncco is not provided.

parameters.name: ncco
parameters.description: Inline NCCO actions array. Use instead of answer_url for simple call flows.

parameters.name: event_url
parameters.description: URLs for call event webhooks (started, ringing, answered, completed).

parameters.name: length_timer
parameters.description: Maximum call length in seconds (1-7200). Default 7200.

parameters.name: ringing_timer
parameters.description: Ringing timeout in seconds before giving up (1-120). Default 60.

ncco.text: Hello, your appointment is confirmed for tomorrow at 3 PM.
